# Crypto Prices MCP

> Live + historical crypto prices, search, trending coins, global market snapshot (CoinGecko)

This MCP server exposes 5 tools via the Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP POST). It runs on Cloudflare Workers and is billed via Dodo Payments. Authenticated via `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` obtained by subscribing at `https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade`.

## Endpoint
- MCP JSON-RPC: https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/mcp
- Health: https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/health
- Landing page: https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/
- Get API key: https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/upgrade?tier=solo

## Tools
- `crypto_prices`: Current prices for one or more coins. Pass CoinGecko ids (use crypto_search if you only have a symbol).
- `crypto_search`: Search for a coin by name or symbol. Returns up to 10 matches with CoinGecko ids.
- `crypto_history`: Historical price series. days = 1/7/14/30/90/180/365/max. interval = daily|hourly (paid tier).
- `crypto_trending`: Top trending coins on CoinGecko in the last 24h.
- `crypto_market_global`: Global crypto market: total market cap, 24h volume, BTC dominance, active cryptos.

## Authentication
Pass `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` on POST /mcp. Free tier: anonymous, 100 calls / month / IP.

## Pricing
- Free: 100 calls / month (anonymous, no signup)
- Solo $9/mo: 2,000 calls / month, 60/min
- Team $29/mo: 10,000 calls / month, 200/min, 5 team seats
- Pro $79/mo: 50,000 calls / month, 600/min, 25 team seats
Billed via Dodo Payments (merchant-of-record). Cancel anytime.

## Account management
- View account: GET https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account (Bearer)
- Rotate key: POST https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/rotate (Bearer)
- GDPR data export: GET https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/export (Bearer)
- Team management (Team+): https://crypto-prices-mcp.atlasword.workers.dev/account/team
